//: bundler resolution so the library's package.json `exports` map governs subpath resolution. The folder-per-item `images/<name>` and `composites/<name>` subpaths cannot be expressed as a single-star tsconfig path substitution (TS5062: at most one '*'), so they (and `ui`/`nativewind`) resolve through `exports` (types condition -> dist/.../*.d.ts); `check` builds dist before this typecheck runs. Only the bare package is pinned to source so the editor resolves the public API without a build.
